/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/test_command.dir/test/test_command.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_command.dir/src/protocol/respParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_command.dir/src/protocol/respEncoder.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_command.dir/src/command/inMemoryDB.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_command.dir/src/command/commandParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_command.dir/src/command/commandDispatcher.cpp.o -o test_command  /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest_main.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libgtest.a
